splits.title: Habit Training in Infancy and Early Childhood
splits.author: Milton Bennion
splits.start_boundary: Habit Training in Infancy and Early

files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles. The first is 'What Am I?' which appears to be an anti-smoking piece that includes quotes from various authorities. The second is the main article 'Habit Training in Infancy and Early Childhood' by Milton Bennion. There are also advertisements and other magazine content mixed in, but these two are the main articles based on the CONTENTS listing.

files.notes: The file appears to contain two complete articles based on the table of contents. However, the text seems to cut off abruptly and may be incomplete, as both articles appear to end with the same phrase about 'engraved upon her pliant and finely attuned mind and spirit' which suggests the second article may not be fully captured in this file.

splits.title: Lesson Department
splits.start_boundary: Lesson Department Theology and Testimony (First Week

files.notes: This is a single comprehensive lesson department containing multiple sections: Theology and Testimony (Book of Mormon study), Work and Business (teacher training topic), Literature (Norwegian literature), and Social Service (personality study on making friends). All sections are part of one unified lesson department article, not separate articles.
